description: AUTH_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
DATABASE_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
API_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
PAYMENT_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
NOTIFY_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
ANALYTICS_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
SEARCH_MODULE module requires exclusive access (mutex lock)
DEVELOPER_A acquires AUTH_MODULE and DATABASE_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition)
DEVELOPER_B acquires DATABASE_MODULE and API_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition)
DEVELOPER_C acquires API_MODULE and PAYMENT_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition)
DEVELOPER_D acquires PAYMENT_MODULE and NOTIFY_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition)
DEVELOPER_E acquires NOTIFY_MODULE and ANALYTICS_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition)
DEVELOPER_F acquires ANALYTICS_MODULE and SEARCH_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition)
DEVELOPER_G acquires SEARCH_MODULE and AUTH_MODULE one at a time (sequential acquisition)
Each developer designs locally before attempting to acquire module locks for commit
Ring-shaped circular wait across 7 developers: each holds one module lock and waits for the next in the ring, forming a 7-node cycle
Partial circular wait: any subset of adjacent developers in the ring can form a shorter deadlock cycle
